title: "Faith gives you the ability to take action" - Phil Stutz
summary: A brief discussion about faith and courage, where Phil Stutz explains that true courage involves walking into the unknown without guarantees. He emphasizes that faith is an active choice that enables action regardless of proof or expected outcomes.

key_claims.claim: The highest species of courage is the ability to walk into the unknown without any guarantees and keep going
Faith is an active choice and is not based on being right
Faith gives you the ability to take action even without any proof
